#  Apache Flink 1.20.2 Release Announcement
July 10, 2025 - Ferenc Csaky
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the second bug fix release of the Flink 1.20 series.
This release includes 25 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes, and min…
